flavorText: Psi Warriors augment martial skill with psionic force, projecting telekinetic and protective power in battle.

features.description: You gain Psionic Energy dice equal to twice your proficiency bonus. These dice fuel Protective Field, Psionic Strike, and Telekinetic Movement, and you regain all expended dice when you finish a long rest.
You refine your psionics, improving your mobility and control with options such as Psi-Powered Leap and Telekinetic Thrust.
Your mind is shielded. You gain resistance to psychic damage and can end one charmed or frightened condition on yourself by expending a Psionic Energy die.
You can create a telekinetic field that grants half cover to chosen creatures for 1 minute, protecting allies from incoming attacks.
Your telekinetic power peaks. You can cast telekinesis without components and can make an extra weapon attack as a bonus action while concentrating on it.

psi-warrior-psionic-power.summary: Gain a psionic resource pool that fuels protective, forceful, and movement-focused battlefield tricks.
psi-warrior-psionic-power.description: Psionic Power is the heart of the subclass. It should feel like disciplined mental force made practical in combat rather than vague flavor text.

psi-warrior-telekinetic-adept.summary: Your telekinetic toolkit broadens into movement, shove, and object-control utility that can matter in and out of combat.

psi-warrior-guarded-mind.summary: Mental discipline helps you resist or recover from hostile psychic pressure.

psi-warrior-bulwark-of-force.summary: Project psionic protection over multiple allies when the group needs a real defensive answer.

psi-warrior-telekinetic-master.summary: Your late-game telekinesis becomes a headline capability rather than a side trick.
